news.title:
Century Plyboards' ESG score remains at 72.5 for FY 2025, per SES ESG Research report.
The company excels in renewable energy usage (79.6%) and zero liquid discharge but faces gender diversity gaps (4.1%).
news.summary:
Century Plyboards' ESG score remains at 72.5 for FY 2025, per SES ESG Research report.
The company excels in renewable energy usage (79.6%) and zero liquid discharge but faces gender diversity gaps (4.1%).

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.

news.title:
Century Plyboards executed a NSE block trade for ~901,836 shares at Rs. 804.5.
The total transaction value of the trade amounted to Rs. 72.55 crores.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards executed a NSE block trade for ~901,836 shares at Rs. 804.5.
The total transaction value of the trade amounted to Rs. 72.55 crores.

news.title:
Century Plyboards' particle board segment achieves breakeven EBITDA, targeting 15% margin by next year's Q4.
The company aims for stable margins in the particle board segment by Q4 next year.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards' particle board segment achieves breakeven EBITDA, targeting 15% margin by next year's Q4.
The company aims for stable margins in the particle board segment by Q4 next year.

news.title:
Century Plyboards expects 15% laminate growth this year, 20% next year.
Plywood growth projected at 5-7% with new capacities in Hoshiarpur, Chennai.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards expects 15% laminate growth this year, 20% next year.
Plywood growth projected at 5-7% with new capacities in Hoshiarpur, Chennai.

news.title: Century Plyboards aims for strong growth through multi-crore capacity expansions by FY27.
news.summary: Century Plyboards aims for strong growth through multi-crore capacity expansions by FY27.

news.title:
Century Plyboards plans a new plywood and MDF factory in Uttar Pradesh.
Phase-1 aims to boost capacity by 60,000 CBM by Q3 FY 2027-28 with ₹800 Cr investment.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards plans a new plywood and MDF factory in Uttar Pradesh.
Phase-1 aims to boost capacity by 60,000 CBM by Q3 FY 2027-28 with ₹800 Cr investment.

news.title:
Century Plyboards redesignates Dr. Sandip Pradhan as Chief Digital & Information Officer, effective immediately.
Mr. Bhargab Dutta resigns as Chief Digital Officer; his last working day is 31 March 2026.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards redesignates Dr. Sandip Pradhan as Chief Digital & Information Officer, effective immediately.
Mr. Bhargab Dutta resigns as Chief Digital Officer; his last working day is 31 March 2026.

news.title:
Century Plyboards approved Q3 FY25 results and reappointed CEO & MD for 5 years.
Company approved a new manufacturing unit in Uttar Pradesh and restructured leadership roles.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards approved Q3 FY25 results and reappointed CEO & MD for 5 years.
Company approved a new manufacturing unit in Uttar Pradesh and restructured leadership roles.

news.title: Century Plyboards reported Q3 consolidated net profit of 588M INR, up from 584M INR YoY.
news.summary: Century Plyboards reported Q3 consolidated net profit of 588M INR, up from 584M INR YoY.

news.title:
Century Plyboards plans to expand US exports, leveraging favorable tariff terms.
Exports of laminates, cubicles, and exterior laminates to be scaled up aggressively.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards plans to expand US exports, leveraging favorable tariff terms.
Exports of laminates, cubicles, and exterior laminates to be scaled up aggressively.

news.title:
Century Ply's management shared insights on industry outlook and revenue guidance.
The discussion was featured in a business news segment by ET Now.
news.summary:

news.title:
Century Plyboards states declining domestic timber prices positively impact their business.
Mention made during an interview with CNBC TV18.

news.title:
Century Plyboards appoints Shri Ashok Kumar Goyal as Plant Head, Hoshiarpur, effective 14th November 2025.
Goyal, a B.Tech graduate, has 37+ years of experience, including 34 years in MDF manufacturing.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards appoints Shri Ashok Kumar Goyal as Plant Head, Hoshiarpur, effective 14th November 2025.
Goyal, a B.Tech graduate, has 37+ years of experience, including 34 years in MDF manufacturing.

news.title:
Century Plyboards discusses Q2 debt reduction plans, EBITDA at 13.
Focus on understanding the capex cycle, according to ET Now.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards discusses Q2 debt reduction plans, EBITDA at 13.
Focus on understanding the capex cycle, according to ET Now.

news.title:
Century Plyboards targets 15%+ growth in plywood, laminates, MDF; FY26 EBITDA margin goal at 13–15%.
₹600Cr capex planned for MDF, particle board expansion; working capital days improved to 63 from 76.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards targets 15%+ growth in plywood, laminates, MDF; FY26 EBITDA margin goal at 13–15%.
₹600Cr capex planned for MDF, particle board expansion; working capital days improved to 63 from 76.

news.title:
Century Ply's Q2 net profit surged 77.7% to ₹70.9 crore YoY.
Revenue rose 17.1% to ₹1,385 crore; EBITDA grew 57% to ₹174 crore.
news.summary:
Century Ply's Q2 net profit surged 77.7% to ₹70.9 crore YoY.
Revenue rose 17.1% to ₹1,385 crore; EBITDA grew 57% to ₹174 crore.

news.title:
Century Plyboards reports Q2 revenue at 13.8B, up from 11.8B YoY.
The revenue jump highlights strong growth in performance for the company.
news.summary:
Century Plyboards reports Q2 revenue at 13.8B, up from 11.8B YoY.
The revenue jump highlights strong growth in performance for the company.
